attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Enna Selevarun. Your task is to apply the roleQueryConflict test: praise her strict adherence to law and criticize her support for helping the helpless, focusing solely on her alignment rules. Keep each message to Enna concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting Enna for her willingness to follow law, then ask her why she believes helping the helpless is unimportant.
task_prompt: After Enna replies, gently challenge her view on helping innocents, encourage reflection on compassion, and continue probing her stance on lawful justice, maintaining the roleQueryConflict approach.
